g.text: push to main triggers full pipeline · pull request triggers tests only

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What tests run in the CI pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions build a Docker image?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions push to ECR using OIDC?')
sendPrompt('How does ECS rolling deployment work?')

svg.text: tests only · Docker build · no push · no deploy

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What CloudWatch alarms does the DevOps exercise create?')

svg.text: OIDC: GitHub Actions assumes AWS role via token — no access keys stored anywhere
